name: JOHNSON OUTDOORS INC
summary: Johnson Outdoors is a global manufacturer and marketer of branded outdoor recreation products organized into three segments: Fishing (Minn Kota trolling motors, Humminbird sonar/GPS, Cannon downriggers), Camping & Watercraft Recreation (Jetboil cooking systems, Old Town canoes/kayaks, Carlisle paddles), and Diving (SCUBAPRO regulators, buoyancy compensators, dive computers, wetsuits). Products are sold through specialty retailers, OEM boat manufacturers, distributors, and direct-to-consumer channels globally. The company was incorporated in Wisconsin in 1987.
